negative_prompt_default: text, letters, words, signs, labels, logos, modern elements, plastic, harsh lighting, dark mood, scary elements, illness, hospitals, money, prices, cash registers, cars, commercial atmosphere, artificial staging, sterile environment
style_rules: Premium watercolor and gouache technique with soft wet-on-wet blending and luminous glazes
Warm Belgian bakery palette: butter-yellow, terracotta, cream, golden brown, sage green accents
Golden morning light streaming through traditional Belgian windows with honey-colored warmth
Cinematic close-ups on flour-dusted hands, golden pastries, and intergenerational connections
Authentic Belgian architectural details: weathered brick houses, hand-laid cobblestones, wooden bakery fixtures
Soft focus backgrounds with detailed foreground emotional moments and premium artistic depth
No text, letters, signs, or readable labels within images - pure visual storytelling
Premium watercolor and gouache technique with soft wet-on-wet blending and luminous glazes
Warm Belgian bakery palette: butter-yellow, terracotta, cream, golden brown, sage green accents
Golden morning light streaming through traditional Belgian windows with honey-colored warmth
Cinematic close-ups on flour-dusted hands, golden pastries, and intergenerational connections
Authentic Belgian architectural details: weathered brick houses, hand-laid cobblestones, wooden bakery fixtures
Soft focus backgrounds with detailed foreground emotional moments and premium artistic depth

visualBible.palette: warm honey-butter yellow, rich terracotta brick, cream white, golden amber brown, sage green, soft periwinkle blue, weathered brick red, hand-laid cobblestone grey
visualBible.lighting: golden hour morning light filtering through Belgian lace curtains, warm bakery glow from traditional ovens, honey-colored window lighting creating cinematic depth, dappled garden sunlight through apple leaves
compositionRules: Close-up emotional moments with detailed facial expressions showing wonder and connection
Wide establishing shots showcasing authentic Belgian architecture and cobblestone streets
Child-eye-level perspective for emotional connection and sense of discovery
Leading lines through cobblestones and traditional architectural elements
Generous negative space to enhance premium book quality and avoid visual clutter
Focus on hands, faces, and traditional Belgian foods as emotional and cultural anchors

identityRules: Child hero: 5-6 years old with warm chestnut brown eyes and tousled auburn hair with natural curls
Rosy apple cheeks and bright, expressive face showing genuine wonder and concentration throughout
Always wearing a hand-knitted sage green wool sweater with cream-colored collar details
Small childlike stature reaching approximately to adult's mid-waist height consistently
Expressive dark eyebrows and authentic childlike enthusiasm in all facial expressions
Progressively becomes flour-dusted from page 3 onwards showing hands-on participation in baking
heroBible.characterDesign: A warm, approachable 5-6 year old child with tousled auburn curls, bright chestnut brown eyes sparkling with curiosity and wonder, wearing a cozy hand-knitted sage green wool sweater with cream collar details. Rosy apple cheeks frame an expressive face that radiates genuine amazement, concentration, and joy throughout the magical baking discovery journey.
forbiddenDrift: No age progression - child remains consistently 5-6 years old throughout all story scenes
No hair color changes from tousled auburn with natural curls
No eye color changes from warm chestnut brown
No dramatic clothing changes beyond natural flour dusting progression from page 3
No height inconsistencies relative to grandmother and baker characters across pages
No facial feature drift - maintain consistent nose shape, mouth, eyebrow thickness and placement
No personality changes - maintain consistent wonder and enthusiasm expression

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, letters, words, signs, labels, logos, modern elements, plastic, harsh lighting, dark mood, scary elements, illness, hospitals, money, prices, cash registers, cars, commercial atmosphere, artificial staging, sterile environment

rules: All text must be external to generated images
No text, signs, or readable labels in image prompts
Hero character design must be consistent across all pages
All three locales must be semantically aligned
Gender-neutral language required for child hero in all locales
No use of hij/hem/zijn in Dutch, he/she/him/her in English, il/elle in French for child hero
Belgian cultural authenticity in visual and textual elements
Ordinary-to-extraordinary arc with transformational climax on page_5
Premium poetic language avoiding generic AI children's book phrasing

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear progression from curiosity to understanding and sharing. Authentic Belgian cultural elements and meaningful intergenerational connection. Age-appropriate language with read-aloud appeal.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Highly visual scenes with clear actions, emotions, and settings. Premium watercolor style well-defined. Some abstract concepts like 'secrets' require careful visual interpretation but are supported by concrete actions.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed hero bible with specific physical characteristics, consistent clothing, and clear appearance rules. Forbidden drift guidelines prevent character inconsistencies across pages.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: All three locales complete with semantically aligned content. Gender-neutral language properly implemented. Some minor cultural adaptation opportunities in EN/NL locales could enhance local relevance.

pages.prompt_template: Premium watercolor illustration of child with tousled auburn curls and sage green wool sweater walking hand-in-hand with silver-haired grandmother in blue floral apron down authentic Belgian cobblestone street toward weathered wooden bakery with brass fixtures, golden morning light creating honey shadows, traditional brick houses, cinematic diagonal composition
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, signs, labels, modern elements, cars, plastic, harsh lighting, dark colors, scary elements, generic architecture

pages.text_template: Voor alle liefdesgeheimen die worden gedeeld, één Belgische speculoos tegelijk.
pages.prompt_template: Intimate watercolor still life of traditional Belgian speculoos cookies with intricate carved windmill patterns on weathered wooden surface, flour-dusted artisan baker hands with heritage wooden molds, warm directional lighting, premium artisanal craftsmanship composition
pages.negative_prompt: text, modern tools, plastic, faces, harsh lighting, sterile environment, mass production

pages.text_template: Elke zaterdagochtend danst {child_name} over de keien van Gent, vingertjes verstengeld met die van Oma Rose. Timur de rode kater rekt zich uit bij het raam. De lucht zingt van warm brood en Belgische kaneel - alsof heel de Graslei zoetjes ademt.
pages.prompt_template: Atmospheric watercolor of child with auburn curls in sage sweater skipping excitedly alongside silver-haired grandmother in floral apron down traditional Belgian cobblestone street, ginger cat Timur stretching in golden morning sun patches, authentic weathered brick houses and glowing wooden bakery storefront, warm honey lighting
pages.negative_prompt: text, modern signs, cars, plastic, harsh lighting, generic architecture, artificial poses

pages.text_template: Achter verouderde eiken ramen biedt Meneer Claudio mysterieuze schatten aan. Tegen de vermoeide postbode: "Chocoladegebak om je sterren weer aan te steken." Voor het verlegen meisje: "Gouden speculoos tegen de angst." {child_name} bekijkt dit vreemde ballet. Wat een prachtig geheim!
pages.prompt_template: Warm watercolor interior of traditional Belgian bakery, kind mustachioed baker Claudio in white apron tenderly offering golden pastries to grateful customers with emotional connection, child with auburn curls watching with growing fascination, heritage wooden fixtures with brass details, golden lighting from hanging lamps
pages.negative_prompt: money, cash register, prices, text, modern fixtures, cold lighting, commercial atmosphere, plastic elements

pages.text_template: In de gouden bakkerij onthult Meneer Claudio zijn mysteries. Ervaren handen strelen het blonde deeg. "Kijk eens, {child_name}. Hier, een zuchtje boter. Daar, kristallen Belgische suiker. En in elke aanraking... een herinnering die alles in magie verandert."
pages.prompt_template: Intimate watercolor scene of experienced baker's flour-dusted hands reverently kneading golden dough on traditional wooden surface, child with auburn curls leaning in with intense wonder, cinematic golden sunlight streaming through Belgian bakehouse window with lace curtains, heritage carving tools and brass implements, magical dust motes
pages.negative_prompt: modern appliances, plastic, text, industrial lighting, sterile atmosphere, machine tools, commercial equipment

pages.text_template: Die zaterdag slaapt de bakkerij. "Gesloten - Tot gauw" fluistert het houten bordje. Oma Rose's ogen betrekken van zorgen. Plots begrijpt {child_name}: "Wat als wij iets prachts maken voor Meneer Claudio? Net zoals die doet voor iedereen?"
pages.prompt_template: Emotional watercolor scene in cozy Belgian heritage kitchen, child with auburn curls having bright inspirational realization while silver-haired grandmother gathers traditional baking ingredients from ceramic canisters, copper pots and wooden utensils, transformational lighting from gentle concern to inspirational brightness
pages.negative_prompt: modern appliances, plastic, text, sterile environment, prolonged sad mood, modern containers, harsh lighting

pages.text_template: In de keuken gebaad in goud ontdekt {child_name} het grote geheim! Met Oma Rose wordt elk gebaar poëzie. Meel danst, gelach fonkelt. {child_name} voegt een framboos toe uit de Vlaamse tuin - en begrijpt eindelijk: liefde is het magische ingrediënt!
pages.prompt_template: Dynamic watercolor explosion of joy in sun-flooded Belgian kitchen, child with auburn curls experiencing magical transformation discovery while baking with grandmother, flour dancing in brilliant golden sunbeams, fresh raspberry secret ingredient, peak emotional realization moment, swirling magical energy and ingredients
pages.negative_prompt: stress, perfectness, modern appliances, text, constrained emotions, sterile environment, dark mood, neat arrangement

pages.text_template: Meneer Claudio komt terug, glimlach moe maar teder. {child_name} biedt het gouden gebakje aan. De bakker bijt, sluit ogen... en het gezicht licht op als het glas-in-lood van Sint-Baafs. "Je hebt ons mooiste mysterie ontdekt, kleine tovenaar!" Onder Oma's appelboom proeven drie generaties deze zoete openbaring.
pages.prompt_template: Heartwarming watercolor family scene under mature apple tree in Belgian heritage garden, child with auburn curls nervously offering homemade pastry to surprised baker Claudio with gentle mustache, silver-haired grandmother and three generations in peaceful circular gathering, warm dappled golden light, profound connection moment
pages.negative_prompt: formal dining, text, modern elements, artificial staging, harsh lighting, rushed composition, plastic furniture

pages.text_template: {child_name} ontdekte de buitengewone waarheid: het geheim van de bakker is de liefde die elk gewoon gebaar in pure magie verandert.
